sentiment.reasoning: Strong demand in the Middle East and a raised outlook indicate improved financial performance for Prynis Systems.

headlines.headline: Ulvyn Microchips to host investor day focused on supply chain optimization strategy

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
